extortion.description: Granville Inn offers elegant accommodations with luxury amenities, a fine dining experience, and versatile meeting spaces. This historic inn, located just outside Columbus, Ohio, features 39 guest rooms and suites that combine old-world charm with modern conveniences. It is highly regarded as a wedding venue, providing picturesque settings and luxurious services for couples. Additionally, Granville Inn caters to business clients with full-service meeting facilities equipped with the latest audio-visual technology.
